titleStmt.title: Letter to Colonel F.A. Heygate Lambert, 18 July 1916
Letters 1916-1923

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter to Colonel F.A. Heygate Lambert authorizing the release of 72 prisoners from Frongoch internment camp.
In 1916 Col. F.A. Heygate Lambert (1857-1929) was serving as the Commandant of Frongoch Internment Camp. Lambert served in the camp until the last of the prisoners were released in December 1916. In the Spring of 1917 he went to Ypres to command a battalion of the Labour Corps.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
313106/ 18th July 1916 Sir I am directed by the Secretary of State to inform
you that, on the recommendation of the Advisory Committee
he authorises the release from internment of the 72 persons
named in the accompanying lists, this being the third
group of prisoners whose release he has authorised These releases should be carried out in accordance
with the instructions already sent you. I am Sir Your obedient servant
The Commandant,
Prisoners of War Camp,
Frongoch
nr. Bala,
N. Wales.
Tipperary Cases
1062 B Benn, William Church St. Tipperary
1064 A Droghan, Francis Irish Town, Clonmel
1523 A Dunne, Arthur Enniscorthy
1064 D Halpin, Thomas Clonmel
1081 Henehan, Patrick J. Main St. Tethard
1064 B Mackey, Domnic Clonmel
1062 A Maloney, Patrick J. Tipperary

1066 B O'Neill, James Clonmel

1064 E RYAN, James Clonmel

1382 GANTLEY, Patrick J. Roscrea Tyrone Cases.
773 Carberry, Charles Donaghmore
961 DUNCAN, Patrick Strabane
768 GRIEVE, James Strabane
1012 McCRORY, Hugh Dunmoyle
Advie release.
Signed on behalf of the Advisory Committee. July 17th 1916. (Signed) JOHN SANKY

July 17th 1916. (Signed) JOHN SANKY.
